name: clms_vlcc_fallow-land-duration_europe_10m_yearly_v1
browserSearchPath: CLMS Land Cover and Land Use Mapping/Croplands/Cropping Patterns/Fallow Land Duration
collectionDescription:
The High Resolution Layer Cropping Patterns - Fallow Land Duration (CPFLD) raster product provides the total fallow land duration (in days) over the complete period 2017-2021.

This dataset is provided annually starting in 2017 with 10 meter rasters (fully conformant with the EEA reference grid) in 100 x 100 km tiles covering the EEA38 countries.

High Resolution Layer Croplands product is part of the European Union’s Copernicus Land Monitoring Service. Confidence layer available for the dataset.

This dataset includes data from the French Overseas Territories (DOMs)

layers.longDescription: Provides at pan-European level the duration of the fallow land period over a five-year period at a spatial resolution of 10 m and a MMU of 0.25 ha.
Confidence layer - a quality indicator for fallow land duration.
